For a long weekend, there was a shortage of staff.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atencion

(Translated by Google)
Very good service
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xKelJYaEZRVFpRZW1aM1JsaFVVbmh4WWxZekxWRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy desagradable la atención, llegamos justo para el cambio de turno y literalmente quien sirve el café pedía los tickets gritando xq se quería ir, quien limpiaba todo lo q eran papeles chicos directamente al suelo. Primera vez q en una YPF la paso mal

(Translated by Google)
Very unpleasant service. We arrived just in time for the shift change and the person serving coffee was literally asking for the tickets, shouting that he wanted to leave, and the person who cleaned up everything, which was small papers, directly onto the floor. It's the first time I've had a bad time at a YPF.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Roger, lamentamos que su experiencia no haya sido buena. Gracias por su comentario, tomaremos medidas al respecto.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pNemMwZHZOV2cwVG1jeVFrSkViR2QzUTNSRFJWRRAB

reviews.comment:
Baños limpios. Y muchos!!!!

(Translated by Google)
Clean bathrooms. And lots of them!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tWcFREQmxhRTlEV1ZoeGIwaHlOV1Z2YUd4alJFRRAB

reviews.comment:
Atienden sin ganas y si querés cargar puntos serviclub con el DNI te dicen que ya lo se puede, lo cual es mentira

(Translated by Google)
They serve without enthusiasm, and if you want to add Serviclub points with your ID, they tell you that it's already possible, which is a lie.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Tomás! Gracias por su comentario, efectivamente las nuevas modificaciones no nos permiten cargar puntos Serviclub. Respecto a la atención, mejoraremos ese aspecto. Saludos!
